description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117. He logged 2 hrs 30 mins of coding time, averaging 1 hr 15 mins per day. His tracked work was mostly Java, with Python and Markdown also appearing in the week’s language breakdown.
